mapper.select: SELECT id, name, slug, description, color_hex, icon_name, is_fiction, created_at FROM genres WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, slug, description, color_hex, icon_name, is_fiction, created_at FROM genres WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, slug, description, color_hex, icon_name, is_fiction, created_at FROM genres ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT g.*, COUNT(bg.book_id) AS book_count FROM genres g LEFT JOIN book_genres bg ON g.id = bg.genre_id GROUP BY g.id ORDER BY g.name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO genres (name, slug, description, color_hex, icon_name, is_fiction, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{colorHex}, #{iconName}, #{isFiction}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE genres SET name = #{name}, slug = #{slug}, description = #{description}, color_hex = #{colorHex}, icon_name = #{iconName}, is_fiction = #{isFiction} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM genres WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
